scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.build:server: cd shared && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:client: cd shared && npm install && npm run build && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.vercel-build: if [ -d "shared" ]; then cd shared && npm install && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build; else cd ../shared && npm install && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build; fi
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server
